raw_consumer_statement: Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, my Citi MasterCard was fraudulently charged a total of {$3400.00} over ten different transactions, ranging from {$7.00} to {$2500.00}. CitiBank reached out to me, and I went through all of my purchases during that time period with the representative to identify the fraudulent charges. I was told that they would be investigating the matter. In XXXX, they sent me a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX that they did not receive sufficient information on me, that the information that they had on had wasn't sufficient to resolve the dispute in my favor, and that the dispute has been closed.
